memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/PROVENCE.htm#BertrandBauxOrangedied1180A as of 7/17/2017

RAYMOND de Baux, son of GUILLAUME-HUGUES de Baux & his wife Vierne --- ([1075/85]-Barcelona 1150). …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Raymond Ier des Baux於1082年出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o萊斯 包-德-普洛福斯時，他的父親Guillaume Hugues des Baux36歲，母親Vierne DE POSQUIERES22歲。他於1111年與Étiennette de Gévaudan-Provence在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o萊斯 包-德-普洛福斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1149年在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿巴薩隆拿享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raymond Ier des Baux于1082年出生在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o萊斯 包-德-普洛福斯时，他的父亲Guillaume Hugues des Baux36岁，母亲Vierne DE POSQUIERES22岁。他于1111年与Étiennette de Gévaudan-Provence在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o萊斯 包-德-普洛福斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1149年在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿巴薩隆拿享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: des
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Alsace and Lorraine): from a shortened form of the German personal name   Debus  .

variants.name: Debus
meanings: German: from a personal name, a vernacular short form of Matthäus (see Matthew ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine); compare Debs .
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from any of various places called Bus (from a regional form of bois ‘wood’) in Eure, Pas-de-Calais, and Somme.

nameMeanings.name: Baux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian (mainly West Bengal) and Bangladeshi: from Bengali baul, Sanskrit vatula ‘madman’. Bearers of this name traditionally lived a lifestyle characterized by isolation from society, typically singing of social inequalities and injustice. They subsisted mainly on alms, considering themselves to be outside any organized religion, representing instead a polymorphic spiritual tradition.
German: relationship name from a term denoting a relative or close friend, from Middle High German buole, Middle Low German bole ‘relative, lover, close friend’.
German: possibly also from a rare variant of the personal name   Paul  .

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: Raymond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Raimund, of Germanic origin, from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + mund ‘protector’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. Subsequently it dropped out of use, but was revived in the middle of the 19th century, together with several other given names of Old English and Norman origin.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Raymond Ier des Baux was born in 1082, in Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, his father, Guillaume Hugues des Baux, was 36 and his mother, Vierne DE POSQUIERES, was 22. He married Étiennette de Gévaudan-Provence in 1111, in Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1149, in Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raymond Ier des Baux est né en 1082, à Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, son père, Guillaume Hugues des Baux, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Vierne DE POSQUIERES, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Étiennette de Gévaudan-Provence en 1111, à Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1149, à Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espagne, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raymond Ier des Baux 1082 in Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume Hugues des Baux 36 und seine Mutter Vierne DE POSQUIERES 22. Er hat 1111 in Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich Étiennette de Gévaudan-Provence geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1149 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raymond Ier des Baux è nato il nel 1082 nel Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume Hugues des Baux, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Vierne DE POSQUIERES, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Étiennette de Gévaudan-Provence nel 1111, nel Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1149, nel Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Spagna, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Raymond Ier des Bauxが1082年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンレス バウクス-デ-プローベンスで生まれた時，父Guillaume Hugues des Bauxは36歳，母Vierne DE POSQUIERESは22歳であった。1111年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンレス バウクス-デ-プローベンスでÉtiennette de Gévaudan-Provenceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1149年にスペインカタルニーアバーセロナバーセロナで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Raymond Ier des Baux(이)가 1082년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 레스 바스-데-프로븐스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume Hugues des Baux(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Vierne DE POSQUIERES(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1111년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 레스 바스-데-프로븐스에서 Étiennette de Gévaudan-Provence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1149년 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 바셀나에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raymond Ier des Baux nasceu em 1082, em Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, seu pai, Guillaume Hugues des Baux, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Vierne DE POSQUIERES, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Étiennette de Gévaudan-Provence em 1111, em Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1149, em Barcelona, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raymond Ier des Baux родился в 1082 г. в местности лесь баукс-де-провенс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume Hugues des Baux было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Vierne DE POSQUIERES, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Étiennette de Gévaudan-Provence в 1111 г. в местности лесь баукс-де-провенс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1149 г. в местности барселона, барселона, каталуня, Испания в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raymond Ier des Baux nació en 1082, en Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, su papá, Guillaume Hugues des Baux, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Vierne DE POSQUIERES, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Étiennette de Gévaudan-Provence en 1111, en Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1149, en Barcelona, Barcelona, Cataluña, España, a la edad de 68 años.
